growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Q1 2026: EPS $0.03 beat; DoD deal $400M equity + $150M loan + 10-year price floor at $110/kg + 100% offtake; China NdPr licensing in force Jan 2026; heavy RE suspension expires Nov 2026 (Tier 1 - DoD/SEC filings; Tier 2 - CSIS/IEA)

Discovery: China's Announcement 18 heavy rare earth export controls (terbium, dysprosium, samarium, yttrium) are squeezing Western manufacturers; China's suspension of controls expires November 2026 creating an urgency cliff; DoD committed $400M equity + $150M loan to MP Materials; company halted China concentrate sales to reindustrialize domestic supply; rare earth concentrate prices up 45% Q/Q (7th consecutive increase).
growth_picks.analyst_take: DoD $400M equity + 10-year NdPr price floor $110/kg; November 2026 China export control cliff creates urgency; but negative FCF/EBITDA and Fwd P/E 54x

catalysts_general: NVIDIA invested $2B via Series A Convertible Preferred (March 2026); Q3 FY2026 revenue $808.4M (+90% YoY); Q4 guide $960M-1.01B; analyst targets $1,000-1,300 but consensus $1,100 = only 4% upside from $1,053 (Tier 1 - Lumentum IR 8-K; Tier 4 - SiliconAngle)

Discovery: Fiscal Q2 revenue +65.5% YoY to $665.5M; NVIDIA committed $2B to Lumentum for optical circuit switches and the $400M+ backlog is sold out through 2027 as data centers push past copper's 1-meter limit at 800G/1.6T speeds — CPO transition to optical is a multi-year structural tailwind.
growth_picks.analyst_take: AVOID NEW ENTRY: NVIDIA $2B strategic investment validates CPO leadership; but near ATH with only 4% analyst upside ($1,100 target vs $1,053 current); 0.1% FCF yield; wait for 20-30% correction

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Q1 2026 earnings releasing May 12 (assessment day); FY2025 revenue $13.8B (+177%); $8.6B Phase 2 Louisiana LNG financing closed; 94% of float sold short; customer arbitration disputes (Tier 1 - BusinessWire/IR)

Discovery: Same Qatar LNG supply shock catalyst as Cheniere but with more spot-price upside exposure; Venture Global closed $8.6B financing for Phase 2 Louisiana LNG facility (delivery starting 2027); shares up ~30% since Iran war began; newer entrant with less contracted exposure means more leverage to structural LNG price surge as Qatar's repair timeline stretches 3-5 years.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Qatar LNG spot leverage far greater than Cheniere; Phase 2 $8.6B financed; but 94% float short + binary earnings TODAY + -$10.85B FCF - wait for post-print reaction

catalysts_general: Q1 2026: Net sales $1,581.4M (flat YoY), organic -4.1%; BMP book-to-bill >1.1x; FCF only $25M; net leverage 3.3x; new CTO from Danaher/Cytiva started May 1; management guides BMP bottom Q2 (Tier 1 - Avantor IR 8-K)

Discovery: Biopharma/life sciences supplies company crushed 50% over the past year (52-week high $16.17, current ~$9) as biotech customers destocked, now triggering its 'Revival' transformation program with new Chief Transformation Officer Ludovic Brellier joining May 1, 2026; Q1 sales stabilized (flat quarter-on-quarter), FCF of $500-550M expected in 2026, and Bioscience & Medtech Products segment runs at 26.7% adjusted operating margin — the recovery of the broader biopharma equipment cycle (see DHR's Q1 inflection) is AVTR's catalyst. Bear case: EPS still declining due to Revival investment spend; margin contraction narrative is active.
growth_picks.analyst_take: P/B 1.0 and Fwd P/E 9.3 near book; Danaher/Cytiva CTO hire signals credible turnaround; but organic still -4.1% and net leverage 3.3x with contracting EBITDA
